_comment: data-v3 answer key — expected END-STATE after the full corpus (replay or live re-enactment). CONTENT-anchored: cite messages by id for replay; for live runs match by text snippet (live message ids differ). Scenario dates live inside message text, never in send-time, so a compressed live re-enactment produces the same key. Optional acts (reactions/edits) are listed separately — the core key never depends on them.
